column2: 1.  Shut down will be required in where earth wires are missing.
2. From Gantry at Karakudi S/S to TN - 1 section is common for 110kV Karakudi - Devakottai & Karakudi - K.Thirupathur Link .

3. From TN 07 to TN - 8A section is common for 110kV Karakudi - Devakottai & Karakudi - Thirumayam Link and there is no earthwire & Clearance issues between TN 4 & 5 for Karakudi - Thirumayam link. So It is recommended to prepare 96F OPGW at this section ( Gantry at Karakudi SS to TN 08A ).
4. From Gantry at Devakottai S/S to TN - 95 section is common for 110kV Karakudi - Devakottai & Devakottai - Thiruvadanai Link .
